title: Xenial Stout Mediterranean Bread Fritters
description: These yeasty, gooey fritters combine stale bread, stout beer, and Mediterranean herbs for a smooth, double-fried weekend treat that is egg-free-friendly and perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Toast the stale bread cubes in the oven at 350°F for 10 minutes until dry.
In a bowl combine the toasted bread, chickpea flour, all-purpose flour, salt, oregano, smoked paprika, and nutritional yeast.
Add the stout beer and almond milk to the dry mixture and stir until a thick batter forms.
Allow the batter to rest for 10 minutes to hydrate the flours.
Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a cazuela over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Drop spoonfuls of the batter into the hot oil and fry for 3 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Remove the fritters onto paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters hot with a drizzle of olive oil and a sprinkle of fresh parsley.
